description: Refund requests ranging from calm enquiries to urgent, angry demands requiring human intervention.

scenarios.customer_message: This is unacceptable, I want my refund now!
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Please hold on while we find a quick solution. Our team will get back to you shortly.

scenarios.customer_message: Hi, I'd like to ask about getting a refund for my last order.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Thanks for reaching out. I'll pass your refund request to our team, who will review it and get back to you shortly.

scenarios.customer_message: You never picked up my clothes but I was charged, I want my money back.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry for the trouble. Please hold on while our team reviews this and gets back to you shortly.

scenarios.customer_message: Only half my items came back clean, can I get a partial refund?
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I understand your concern. I'll share this with our team so they can review your order and respond shortly.
